289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

413.issue_title: refactor: Redesign Error DTOs and segregate BaseToolOutput concerns

cycles.name: Test Suite Prep & Assertion Helpers

deliverables.description: Centralized test assertion helper file tests/mcp_server/assertion_helpers.py created.
All assertions on result.success and result.error_message in the test suite refactored to use the helpers.

cycles.exit_criteria: Assertion helper module created, all 250+ assertions refactored to use it, and test suite remains green.

cycles.name: Exceptions Taxonomy Expansion

deliverables.description: EnforcementDecorator catches EnforcementError and maps to EnforcementErrorOutput.
ToolErrorHandlerDecorator catches MCPSystemError and maps to ExecutionErrorOutput.

cycles.exit_criteria: EnforcementError exception integrated into Core Exceptions, EnforcementRunner, and EnforcementDecorator, with passing unit tests.

cycles.name: DTO Schemas Segregation

deliverables.description: BaseToolOutput updated with passed: bool field.
BaseErrorOutput and subclasses refactored to remove success and error_message fields.
CacheErrorOutput removed from schemas and imports.

cycles.exit_criteria: BaseToolOutput, BaseErrorOutput, and all subclasses refactored to remove success/error_message fields, and CacheErrorOutput deleted.

cycles.name: Dispatch & Presentation Alignment

deliverables.description: server.py uses isinstance to identify error DTOs and sets isError transport flag.
TextPresenter resolves formatting templates from presentation.yaml using 3-level lookup hierarchy.
validate_presentation_alignment performs boot-time checks on BaseErrorOutput subclasses and template placeholders.

cycles.exit_criteria: Server uses isinstance to set protocol isError flag, TextPresenter resolves via lookup order, and validate_presentation_alignment checks placeholders at boot.

cycles.name: Core Tools Refactoring

deliverables.description: git_tools.py mutation tools bubble exceptions and remove success=False returned DTOs.
git_fetch_tool.py and git_pull_tool.py bubble exceptions and remove success=False returned DTOs.
scaffold_artifact.py and scaffold_schema_tool.py bubble exceptions and remove success=False returned DTOs.
quality_tools.py, test_tools.py, safe_edit_tool.py, and template_validation_tool.py return success DTO with passed=False on failure.
All tool execution methods use strict execute return type annotations.

cycles.exit_criteria: All 14 tool modules refactored to bubble exceptions and remove local try-except faal-DTO blocks, type checking passes, and legacy compatibility layers are removed.
